case_title: ROSSI ALEXANDER B. VS JOGOV ALEXANDER A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY ROSSI ALEXANDER B. AS TO DEFENDANT JOGOV ALEXANDER A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
